description: First Golden Path hero case for a credible idealized shallow-cumulus experiment.
physical_question: How do low-level moisture, surface heating, cap strength, cap height, dry air aloft, and mixing/entrainment affect shallow-cumulus formation, timing, depth, updraft strength, and cloud-water evolution?
learning_goals: Recognize first cloud time and cloud depth in a baseline lower-atmosphere setup.
Use the baseline as the reference for one-control-at-a-time variations.
Understand that exact cloud morphology is inspected, not treated as a brittle pass/fail result.
intended_behavior: A balanced shallow-cumulus case that can form clouds under local CM1 validation.
expected_behavior: Clouds may form after heating and mixing erode inhibition; timing and depth remain subject to CM1 validation.

controls.label: Low-level humidity
controls.description: Relative moisture in the lower atmosphere around the baseline profile.
controls.cm1_mapping_notes: Future mapping should adjust low-level sounding moisture while preserving scientific disclosure.

controls.label: Surface heating
controls.description: Relative daytime heating strength for boundary-layer growth.
controls.cm1_mapping_notes: Future mapping should adjust surface flux or related idealized forcing.

controls.label: Cap strength
controls.description: Relative resistance to rising thermals near the capping layer.
controls.cm1_mapping_notes: Future mapping should adjust sounding stability near the cap.

run_size_presets.label: Quick look
run_size_presets.purpose: Sanity-check setup and rough cloud behavior.
run_size_presets.expected_runtime: roughly 10-20 minutes when feasible on the local Mac
run_size_presets.output_notes: coarser output cadence is acceptable if clearly labeled

run_size_presets.label: Standard
run_size_presets.purpose: Normal personal exploration and useful saved diagnostics.

run_size_presets.label: Deep / overnight
run_size_presets.confidence: higher detail only after local validation
run_size_presets.output_notes: larger output should be explicit before launch

expected_diagnostics.first_cloud_time: record if and when shallow cumulus first appears
expected_diagnostics.cloud_base_top: record cloud base and cloud top if clouds form
expected_diagnostics.cloud_water_summary: summarize cloud-water maximum and time evolution
expected_diagnostics.rain_onset: not expected for baseline, but record if present

cm1_template.mapping_notes: Mapping is a documented placeholder until manually validated against local CM1.

warnings: Preview estimates are guidance only; CM1 output is the source of truth.
limitations: Template mapping is not scientifically accepted until local/manual CM1 validation.
advanced_settings_notes: Raw CM1 namelist fields belong in advanced/developer views.
